title: NeoPluginHide
description: NeoPluginHide is a lightweight Paper/Spigot plugin 1.21.x that hides discovery commands and customizes your server identity in the F3 screen.
body:
[ ![erly acces](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2334cf3eb4b13ee2695bae533f8044f6237efd83.png)](https://discord.gg/uuZ6VPVMvP)

![Protect your server, hide your secrets, define your identity.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/876330a0163bdef982ebe6239623453920f3bc4b.png)

**NeoPluginHide** is a lightweight Paper/Spigot plugin (1.19 в†’ 1.21.x) that hides all discovery commands like `/plugins`, `/version`, `/about`, `/help`, and removes tab completion for them.  
It also allows you to **customize the Server Brand** shown in the F3 debug screen, and supports **multiple languages (English, French, Spanish)**.

---

## рџ§© Features

- рџ”’ Blocks `/plugins`, `/version`, `/about`, `/help`, `?`, `icanhasbukkit`, and aliases  
- рџЄ„ Custom **fake plugin list** for `/plugins`  
- рџЋ­ Customizable **Server Brand** (replaces вЂњPaperвЂќ in F3)  
- рџ—ЈпёЏ Multi-language support: `en`, `fr`, `es`  
- рџ’¬ Fully configurable messages  
- рџљ« Removes tab-completion for hidden commands  
- вљ™пёЏ Reload via `/neopluginhide reload`  
- рџ‘‘ Permissions for admin and bypass  

---

## вљ™пёЏ Configuration

Example `config.yml`:

```yaml
settings:
  language: "en"                # en, fr, es
  server-brand: "NeoServer"     # shows in F3
  hide-tab-suggestions: true
  bypass-permission: "neopluginhide.bypass"

  blocked-commands:
    - "pl"
    - "plugins"
    - "ver"
    - "version"
    - "help"
    - "about"
    - "icanhasbukkit"

  fake-plugins:
    - "WorldEdit"
    - "Essentials"
    - "LuckPerms"
```

---

## рџ§° Commands

| Command | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `/neopluginhide reload` | Reloads the configuration file |

---

## рџ§  Permissions

| Permission | Description | Default |
|-------------|--------------|----------|
| `neopluginhide.admin` | Access to `/neopluginhide reload` | OP |
| `neopluginhide.bypass` | Skip all protections and see everything | OP |

---

## рџ§ѕ Compatibility

- вњ… **Paper**, **Spigot**, **Purpur**  
- вњ… **Minecraft 1.21.x**  
- вњ… **Java 21+**  

---

## рџЊЌ Localization

The plugin supports **English**, **French**, and **Spanish** messages.

Change the language in your config:

```yaml
settings:
  language: "fr"
```

---

## рџ“ё F3 Custom Brand

Change the text displayed in F3 (вЂњServer BrandвЂќ):

```yaml
settings:
  server-brand: "YourCustomName"
```

---
